name: BB:FalsePositive: Proxy Server False Positive Categories
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive categories that occur to or from proxy servers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers and BB:HostReference: Proxy Servers building blocks.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Proxy Server False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers, BB:HostReference: Proxy Servers
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Proxy Server False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers, BB:HostReference: Proxy Servers
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events
